_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Nispa amigo, yaykuy.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan sapa simipi kicharisqa rurasqa. Sapa simi uj traduccion riwariywan.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Simi lista Marks preciokunawan wasipim. Marks llankay tokenkuna, manachus acciónkuna.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Liana Banyan {{language}} simiman tikray. {{marks}} Marks taripaykuspayki.
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Kay plataformapin tukuy simikunam imaymanapi suticharisqa. Waranqa 26 sutikuna.
speakFriend.step1Body: Help Wanted lapitam Traduccion Riwariy kichariy.
speakFriend.step2Body: Tukuy string tikray. Bounty Poster ruway.
speakFriend.step3Body: Chaskinaspayki Marks chaskiyta IP Ledger rikuchiy.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Niy masiy, yaykuy."

languageSwitcher.tip: Durin Punkupi sapa simi gaveluwan kamayqa yakuspas!
